attempts.strategy: Split into (≥) lift-and-cons + (≤) Steinitz-exchange. After `IsLocalRing.spanFinrank_maximalIdeal_eq_finrank_cotangentSpace` rewrites, reduce to spanFinrank equation and `le_antisymm` into two inequalities.
attempts.insight: Both directions close kernel-only (~150 LOC total). (≥): lift min gen finset T of 𝔪(R/(x)) via Function.surjInv (Ideal.Quotient.mk_surjective); T ∪ {x} generates 𝔪 R via Ideal.comap_map_of_surjective'. (≤): Steinitz-exchange. Take min gen V of 𝔪 R size n. Express x = Σ c v • v. Since x ∉ 𝔪², some c v₀ ∉ 𝔪 (Nakayama: Ideal.mul_mem_mul). Hence c v₀ is a unit, allowing v₀ = (↑u⁻¹) * x - Σ (↑u⁻¹) * c v * v; apply mkx → mkx '' V.erase v₀ generates 𝔪 R'. Tech lessons: `rw` rewrites ALL occurrences (use `rwa [← hv₀_eq] at` instead of `rw [hv₀_eq]` when v₀ appears both as standalone term and inside V.erase v₀); `Submodule.FG` dot-notation fails (use explicit `Submodule.FG.exists_span_finset_card_eq_spanFinrank h`); `linear_combination` essential when `ring` alone fails.
